purpose: Canonical source for first Monte Carlo / PERT variance dashboards for WCS.LCC/PVPS and HCC suction conditions.

distributions.name: PVPS suction pressure
distributions.interpretation: Represents VLP suction variability; low tail increases ingress/stability concern.

distributions.name: LP outlet / HCC suction pressure
distributions.interpretation: Represents PVPS outlet/HCC suction window; sets warm compressor inlet boundary.

distributions.name: QRB-WCS pressure loss
distributions.interpretation: Allowed approx 50 mbar; expected lower due to large pipe diameter.

covariance_assumptions.relationship: positive control coupling expected but not yet vendor-validated
covariance_assumptions.risk: If suction drops while outlet requirement remains high, unit margin and VFD compensation become critical.
High-flow operation can consume margin faster than linear assumptions suggest.
